title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Backend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
